item.title: What Started the Dealership Dispute
item.description: A car buying dispute escalates into a court case, with the details centered on what started the fight. What happened at the dealership?

media:content.media:title: What Started the Dealership Dispute
media:content.media:description: A car buying dispute escalates into a court case, with the details centered on what started the fight. What happened at the dealership?

item.title: How to Spot a Common Car Buying Scam
item.description: A quick look at the move used in this car buying scam so you can recognize it faster. Useful for shoppers comparing used cars, dealership offers, and pricing. What signs do you watch for before buying a car?

media:content.media:title: How to Spot a Common Car Buying Scam
media:content.media:description: A quick look at the move used in this car buying scam so you can recognize it faster. Useful for shoppers comparing used cars, dealership offers, and pricing. What signs do you watch for before buying a car?

item.title: Chevy Dealer Scam Hidden in the Fine Print
item.description: A look at the line that could slip past unnoticed in a car deal. What should buyers watch for when reviewing pricing and dealer paperwork?

media:content.media:title: Chevy Dealer Scam Hidden in the Fine Print
media:content.media:description: A look at the line that could slip past unnoticed in a car deal. What should buyers watch for when reviewing pricing and dealer paperwork?

item.title: A Small Factory Detail Buyers Often Miss
item.description: One tiny factory detail can reveal more than the window sticker when shopping used cars. A practical look at Subaru buying details and what they may mean for real-world value.

media:content.media:title: A Small Factory Detail Buyers Often Miss
media:content.media:description: One tiny factory detail can reveal more than the window sticker when shopping used cars. A practical look at Subaru buying details and what they may mean for real-world value.

item.title: The $1,000 Car Buying Mistake People Keep Making
item.description: A look at a common car buying mistake that can cost people $1,000. What should buyers watch for before making a deal?

media:content.media:title: The $1,000 Car Buying Mistake People Keep Making
media:content.media:description: A look at a common car buying mistake that can cost people $1,000. What should buyers watch for before making a deal?

item.title: Trade-In Appraisals: One Detail Can Change the Value
item.description: One overlooked detail can swing the whole appraisal. Learn how trade-in pricing can change and what to watch for during the appraisal process. What detail do you check first?

media:content.media:title: Trade-In Appraisals: One Detail Can Change the Value
media:content.media:description: One overlooked detail can swing the whole appraisal. Learn how trade-in pricing can change and what to watch for during the appraisal process. What detail do you check first?

item.title: How a Trade-In Move Can Cost You More
item.description: One small move can turn your trade-in into easy money for the dealer. This video looks at trade-in pricing, hidden fees, and how dealers can structure deals. What should buyers watch for before trading in?

media:content.media:title: How a Trade-In Move Can Cost You More
media:content.media:description: One small move can turn your trade-in into easy money for the dealer. This video looks at trade-in pricing, hidden fees, and how dealers can structure deals. What should buyers watch for before trading in?

item.title: What to Watch Before Signing at a Chevy Dealer
item.description: A closer look at where car buyers can get burned before signing paperwork, with a focus on dealer fees and the buying process. What should shoppers check first?
